How Ishan Kishan’s Return Transformed the T20 World Cup Squad

Dec 22, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

How Ishan Kishan’s Return Transformed the T20 World Cup Squad

Ishan Kishan’s recall to India’s T20 World Cup squad marks a compelling redemption arc built on discipline, consistent performance, and respect for the game. His return is not merely a reflection of talent but a testament to a selection philosophy that prioritizes sustained effort, professional accountability, and merit over entitlement. Kishan’s journey back to the national side highlights the value of hard work and patience in cricket, especially in a highly competitive environment like Indian cricket.
